caption: A man with grey hair and glasses is speaking into a black microphone. He is wearing a light blue patterned shirt and a long beaded necklace with a dark red accent bead. He is positioned in front of a beige slatted background. The text "ORCA" appears in white capital letters on the right side of the screen. As the sequence progresses, the man's facial expressions shift slightly as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing to form words. His head remains relatively still, centered in the frame, while the microphone stays positioned in front of him. The lighting and background remain constant throughout the clip, maintaining a static environment while the man's lips and facial muscles move.
